productDisplayName: Vans Men Authentic Navy Blue Casual Shoes
description: Want to channel the spirit of the 1960s? The decade that birthed skateboard culture was also the decade that brought us the first vans shoe – and you can proudly step out in the very same Authentic unisex shoe which first hit the shelves in 1966. Supremely classic, comfortable and practical, this will look great on both guys and girls. Navy blue colour with bright white laces gives a nautical feel. Uppers Canvas uppers for durability and comfort Lace-ups for a snug Fit Brand tab on the forefoot seam and brand name on the back, on the lasting Cushioned footbed for all day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole Rubber outsole for durability Reverse waffle pattern for better grip Lasting with toe counter for extra protection to the toes Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth or use a brush to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
